creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
Output to terminal when started there: firefox &
[Parent 1377, ProcessHangMon] WARNING: pipe error: Socket is not connected: file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/firefox-esr/work/firefox-115.6.0/ipc/chromium/src/chrome/common/ipc_channel_posix.cc:724

The directory above is very strange as wrkdir points to a directory used during the port build process.


When started from menu is hangs and process must be killed. Keyboard and mouse have no effects, interesting is that the bookmarks toolbar does not appear.
